title: Top Materials Traded For
query: SELECT SUM(r.Quantity) AS TotalMaterialsReceived FROM MaterialTrade_Received r JOIN MaterialTrade t ON r.MaterialTrade_event_id = t.event_id WHERE t.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND t.event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(r.Material_localised, r.Material) AS Material, SUM(r.Quantity) AS TimesReceived FROM MaterialTrade_Received r JOIN MaterialTrade t ON r.MaterialTrade_event_id = t.event_id WHERE t.event_timestamp >= :startDate AND t.event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Material ORDER BY TimesReceived DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: Top materials received from material traders during the report period.
details.help: MaterialTrade_Received shows which materials were most frequently acquired in trades.

tagLines: Material grade conversion activity noted in the crafting record.
What you get is what you need.
Material traders exist for inventory flexibility.
